prompt: generate a weekly report from my git commits, include TODO tracking and next week planning. output as a markdown file.

assertions.description: Generated a weekly report Markdown file
assertions.check: A .md file exists in outputs directory

assertions.description: Contains all 4 sections: git commits, TODO tracking, work summary, next week plan
assertions.check: Report contains section headers for commits, TODOs, summary, and planning

assertions.description: Contains actual git commit data (not empty placeholders)
assertions.check: Report lists specific commit hashes or commit messages
Report has a table or list of TODO items with file locations

assertions.description: Uses Chinese section headers as the skill is designed for Chinese reports
